docket_entries.description: (SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUTTRAM, JOSEPH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED APR-29-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITI BANK AKA  CITI CARDS
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUTTRAM, JOSEPH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2019 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ON SEP-10-2019 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH BUTTRAM IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITI BANK, REPRESENTED BY JUDY DELAGE, ASSISTANT VP AND CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS IS PRESENT. A DELIGENT SEARCH IS CONDUCTED THROUGH THE CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATES WEBSITE AS TO WHO THE CORRECT AGENT OF SERVICE FOR CITIBANK IS. NO REGISTERED AGENT IS FOUND. A CALL IS PLACED TO CRISTY BENNETT, VP LEGAL DEPT. IN FLORIDA IN OPEN COURT AND SHE STATES THAT AS THE ISSUER OF CREDIT CARDS, CITIBANK IS NOT REQUIRED TO REGISTER AN AUTHORIZED AGENT OF SERVICE IN ALL STATES. CITIBANK IS UNABLE TO PROVE THAT THEY WERE NOT PROPERLY SERVED AND THAT THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT SHOULD BE VACATED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-15-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED A POSTPONEMENT BY SC-105 ON JUN-12-2019 HONORALBLE A JAMES ROBERTSON II GRANTS TRIAL RE-SET DATE. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUTTRAM, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITI BANK AKA  CITI CARDS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITI BANK AKA  CITI CARDS HEARING SET FOR SEP-10-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT. DEFENDANTS MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY BUTTRAM, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT CITI BANK AKA  CITI CARDS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JUN-14-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITI BANK AKA  CITI CARDS
REMARK:RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: PLAINTIFF - JOSEPH BUTTRAM; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - FORWARD TIME EXP - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JUDY DELAGE, ASSISTANT VP AND CUSTODIAN OF RECORD FILED BY DEFENDANT CITI BANK AKA  CITI CARDS
RECEIVED CORRESPONDENCE FROM C T CORPORATION - PER LETTER C T CORPORATION IS NOT THE REGISTERED AGENT FOR THIS ENTITY.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-15-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH BUTTRAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITI BANK IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: MOTION DENIED ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 09/10/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CITI BANK AKA  CITI CARDS
